# Qwen Code Session Context

<!-- Auto-generated context injection for new sessions -->
<!-- Source this file or reference in prompts -->

## Quick Context Commands

```bash
# Show current session context
./scripts/inject-context.sh

# Or source it to set environment variables
source ./scripts/inject-context.sh
```

## Memory Files

- **Global Memory**: `/root/.qwen/QWEN.md` (user-level preferences)
- **Project Memory**: `/root/air/qwq/QWEN.md` (project-specific)
- **Task Tracker**: `/root/air/qwq/shared-tasks/` (multi-agent sync)

## Session Resume

To resume previous context:
1. Reference `QWEN.md` in your first prompt
2. Use `/qwq-usage` to check previous session activity
3. Check `6-Diaries/` for dated session notes
